title: Physician

rationales.taskAutomation: Reviewing standard labs/imaging, drafting clinical notes and checking drug interactions are automatable; complex diagnostic reasoning and procedures are not.
rationales.toolMaturity: Ambient documentation and diagnostic-support tools are credible and improving quickly across major EHR platforms.
rationales.adoption: Large health systems increasingly deploy ambient scribing and decision-support tools; adoption varies widely by specialty and setting.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can pre-draft notes and flag abnormal results for review, but diagnosis, procedures and patient communication remain physician-led.

tasksAtRisk: Reviewing standard lab results and imaging
tasksGrowing: Complex diagnostic reasoning and differential diagnosis
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-1229 (Physicians, All Other), p25-p75 rounded
insight: Ambient AI scribes and decision-support tools are cutting real documentation burden, and physicians who pair clinical judgment with these tools are becoming more effective, not less needed. The complex reasoning and procedures at the core of the job stay out of reach for now.
